name: AutoRewarder
desc: An advanced, set-and-forget automation tool for Microsoft Rewards. AutoRewarder performs Bing searches for PC and mobile point collection, collects Daily Sets,…
descFull: An advanced, set-and-forget automation tool for Microsoft Rewards. AutoRewarder performs Bing searches for PC and mobile point collection, collects Daily Sets, and uses mathematically driven, human-like input simulation (W3C Actions, Bezier curves, and smart scrolling). Packaged as an executable Windows app for a seamless, plug-and-play experience
